name: Hackettstown Tennis and Pickleball Courts
description: Hackettstown Tennis and Pickleball Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Hackettstown, NJ. There are 3 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Independence Township Recreation Complex
description: The pickleball court is in need of repairs or resurfacing. Some cracks and depressions exist.
open_play_schedule: Contact Melissa Shurack in Recreation Dept.

name: Larry Marino Field
description: Larry Marino Field is a place to play pickleball in Alpha, NJ. There are 3 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Oscar W. Unangst Memorial Fields
description: Oscar W. Unangst Memorial Fields is a place to play pickleball in Belvidere, NJ. There are 3 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Swayze Mill Park
description: Swayze Mill Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Hope, NJ. There is 1 outdoor concrete court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. The court is free.

name: Volunteer Firehouse Meeting Room
description: The Firehouse Meeting Room can be rented and one pickleball court can be set up in the space with some room for seating around the perimeter of the court.
open_play_schedule: WINGS Seniors determine when pickleball will be offered. Meetings are generally Wednesday mornings but not all meetings include pickleball as an activity.
fees: Private — Contact the Recreation Department to learn more.

name: Walter’s Park
description: Come play pickleball at Walter’s Park in Phillipsburg, NJ! There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can’t reserve the courts. The courts are free.
